\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align}\n\\Delta\\phi\\!\\left(\\frac{16}{15}\\right) &= \\frac{\\pi}{15} \\approx 12^\\circ, \\\\\n\\Delta\\phi\\!\\left(\\frac{10}{9}\\right) &= \\frac{\\pi}{9} \\approx 20^\\circ, \\\\\n\\Del...",math_methods,"s of interest,\n\\begin{align}\n\\Delta\\phi\\!\\left(\\frac{16}{15}\\right) &= \\frac{\\pi}{15} \\approx 12^\\circ, \\\\\n\\Delta\\phi\\!\\left(\\frac{10}{9}\\right) &= \\frac{\\pi}{9} \\approx 20^\\circ, \\\\\n\\Delta\\phi(\\chi) &= \\frac{5\\pi}{27} \\approx 33.34^\\circ.\n\\end{align}
